extraction.one_line_summary: MOLARD Rudy won from a fractured 25-rider breakaway after KALAVMAA Jaakko bridged back post-flat tire on the final climb's descent.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway fractured on climbs before final descent, rewarding diesel climbers who could descend aggressively over pure puncheurs.
KALAVMAA Jaakko's flat tire on final climb approach proved survivable due to climbing strength, bridged solo within 2km.
Winning move launched on descent not summit, exploiting large breakaway's poor cooperation through technical sections.
MOLARD held position through cramps when KALAMAA attacked, betting on track-racing sprint from compromised field.

rider_signals.MOLARD Rudy: positive: first stage win in years, strong tactical restraint waiting through KALAMAA's late attack despite cramping
rider_signals.KALAVMAA Jaakko: positive: bridged 44-second gap solo after mechanical on climb, showing exceptional climbing depth for classics rider
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: negative: separated from ROSSETTO on climbs in what was supposed to be Cofidis two-man tactical unit
rider_signals.ROSSETTO Stephane: negative: dropped 10-12 seconds from DE MARCHI partner despite being in planned break collaboration
rider_signals.AMADOR Andrey: neutral: active in GC group's chase calculation at 1:37-1:38 gap threshold over summit
